value.name: Cross-site Scripting (XSS)
value.description: The software does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes user-controllable input before it is placed in output that is used as a web page that is served to other users.
value.mitigation: Output encoding, input validation, Content Security Policy.

value.name: SQL Injection
value.description: The software constructs all or part of an SQL command using externally-influenced input from an upstream component, but it does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes special elements that could modify the intended SQL command.

value.name: Path Traversal
value.description: The software uses external input to construct a pathname that is intended to identify a file or directory that is located underneath a restricted parent directory, but the software does not properly neutralize special elements within the pathname.

value.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
value.description: The web application does not, or can not, sufficiently verify whether a well-formed, valid, consistent request was intentionally provided by the user who submitted the request.

value.name: Improper Authentication
value.description: When an actor claims to have a given identity, the software does not prove or insufficiently proves that the claim is correct.

value.name: Use of Hard-coded Credentials
value.description: The software contains hard-coded credentials, such as a password or cryptographic key, which it uses for its own inbound authentication, outbound communication to external components, or encryption of internal data.

value.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
value.description: Adversaries may attempt to exploit a weakness in an Internet-facing host or system to initially access a network.

value.name: Active Scanning
value.description: Adversaries may execute active reconnaissance scans to gather information about hosts and services on a target network.

value.name: Cloud Infrastructure Discovery
value.description: Adversaries may discover cloud infrastructure (e.g., AWS, Azure) and the services running on it.
